chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1526 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 20.10.2016. Mr. Muhammad Yameen Narban, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel alongwith SIP Muhammad Younis Rajput, P.S Shahdadpur. Respondents No.5 & 6 present in person. -.-.-. Through the present petition, the petitioner is mainly seeking a relief, inter alia, that he may not be harassed and police officials should not act in a biased manner at the behest of private Respondents. Today, private Respondents No.5 & 6 are in attendance and they categorically deny that they have extended any threat or caused any harassment to the petitioner. Both respondents further submit that it is the petitioner who has purchased a plot from them but till date has not paid the amount. Be that as it may, both Respondents are at liberty to seek their remedy/remedies in accordance with law at any fora but shall not take law in their hands. In this regard, learned State Counsel is also directed to ensure that police officials will not act in excess of their powers and authority and should not patronize any of the private parties. Copy of this order should be provided to learned State counsel for compliance. In view of the above, this petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
